rules.name: CAA Record
rules.description:
CAA Record

A CAA record was discovered. A CAA record is used to specify which certificate authorities (CAs) are allowed to issue certificates for a domain.

locations.description:
**URL:** GET http://172.16.34.30:3000/api/Challenges/?name=Score%20Board
**Analyzer:** Shell injection scanner
**Module:** shell-injection-scanner
**Confidence:** tentative

**Payloads:**
The value of the "name" parameter in the query string appears to be vulnerable to shell injection attacks.
The payload ping -c 5 127\.0\.0\.1 was submitted.
1 requests were made. The delays were: 2m47.672809841s.
**Payload:** `ping -c 5 127\.0\.0\.1`

**URL:** GET http://172.16.34.30:3000/rest/products/38/reviews
**Analyzer:** Shell injection scanner
**Module:** shell-injection-scanner
**Confidence:** tentative

**Payloads:**
The pathname parameter #1 appears to be vulnerable to shell injection attacks.
The payload %27%3B%20sleep%205%3B%20%27 was submitted.
1 requests were made. The delays were: 3.026s.
**Payload:** `%27%3B%20sleep%205%3B%20%27`

**URL:** GET http://172.16.34.30:3000/rest/products/37/reviews
**Analyzer:** Shell injection scanner
**Module:** shell-injection-scanner
**Confidence:** tentative

**Payloads:**
The pathname parameter #4 appears to be vulnerable to shell injection attacks.
The payload %60sleep%203%60 was submitted.
1 requests were made. The delays were: 3.338s.
**Payload:** `%60sleep%203%60`

**URL:** http://172.16.34.30:3000/
**Analyzer:** Active Signature Scanner
**Module:** nuclei-runner
**Confidence:** certain

A CAA record was discovered. A CAA record is used to specify which certificate authorities (CAs) are allowed to issue certificates for a domain.

**Payloads:**
**Payload:** `http://172.16.34.30:3000/`

findings.description:
URL: http://172.16.34.30:3000/
Analyzer: Active Signature Scanner
Module: nuclei-runner
Confidence: certain

A CAA record was discovered. A CAA record is used to specify which certificate authorities (CAs) are allowed to issue certificates for a domain.

Payloads:
Payload: http://172.16.34.30:3000/

;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 33967
